theme_and_archetype.description: Cinematic, moody, and expensive. Optimized for high-end property buyers and investors, conveying trust, exclusivity, and premium service.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight

typography.instructions: Never use 'Inter' for headings. Emphasize contrast in weights (e.g., extremely light headings paired with highly legible body copy).

animations.fade_in_up: framer-motion standard entry for sections (y: 30, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1])

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/80 border-b border-white/5 transition-colors duration-300
header.elements: Logo (Playfair Display, tracking-widest), centered or right-aligned sparse navigation, CTA 'Request Access'

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex items-end pb-24 relative overflow-hidden
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0B] via-[#0A0A0B]/40 to-black/20 z-10

contact_form.style: Minimalist frictionless form. Use Shadcn inputs heavily customized.
contact_form.input_style: bg-transparent border-0 border-b border-white/20 rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-[#D4AF37] text-xl transition-colors
contact_form.label_style: text-xs tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-white/50 mb-2 block
contact_form.button: w-full py-6 bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase hover:bg-white transition-colors mt-8

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-medium tracking-wide transition-all hover:bg-white
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium tracking-wide transition-all hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37]

hero.alt: Luxury modern house exterior with pool at sunset
hero.usage: Main background for the hero section. Must have heavy gradient overlay so white text is perfectly readable.

about_team.alt: Professional real estate and marketing team
about_team.usage: Use in the About Us section, perhaps with a slight grayscale or dark tint filter.

gallery.alt: Luxurious two storey suburban residential house exterior

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Use the primary and secondary colors as defined.
Do NOT use standard rounded borders (rounded-md/lg) on primary elements; use square corners (rounded-none) for a high-end editorial feel.
The Hero section must contain the brand name 'K1 Real Estate and Marketing' and a strong luxury value proposition (e.g., 'Private homes for buyers who expect more.').
Integrate the 'Google Business Profile' seamlessly, perhaps as a 'View Our Google Reviews' button or embedded map/listings grid.
Contact form must have Name, Mobile Number, and Requirement fields. Ensure it is frictionless and visually matches the dark luxury aesthetic (e.g., bottom-border only inputs).
Ensure the contact form logic submits correctly to a FastAPI backend endpoint that handles the email sending.
Use framer-motion to add sophisticated, slow reveal animations to text and images as the user scrolls.
